questions.question: Which of the following groups of plants is known as Magnoliophyta?
questions.explanation: Angiosperms are known as Magnoliophyta. Angiosperms are vascular plants which have stems, roots, and leaves.They are plants that produce flowers and bear their seeds in fruits.

questions.question: A plant belonging to which of the following groups would show least adaptation to marine water?
questions.explanation: A plant belonging to angiosperms group would show least adaptation to marine water. Angiosperms are vascular plants that have stems, roots, and leaves.

questions.question: The ancestors of land plants were most likely similar to modern__:
questions.explanation: The ancestor of the modern multicellular plant is the green algae, Chlorophyta.

questions.question: What do we call the non-green heterotrophic plants of plant kingdom?
questions.explanation: Fungi are called the non-green heterotrophic plants of plant kingdom. This Kingdom includes smuts, rusts, yeasts, molds, mushrooms, etc. It is an eukaryotic organism.

questions.question: Which of the following crops helps in nitrogen fixation?
questions.explanation: Any legume plants will help in nitrogen fixation. Beans contain symbiotic bacteria called Rhizobia within nodules in their root systems, producing nitrogen compounds that help the plant to grow and compete with other plants. When the plant dies, the fixed nitrogen is released, making it available to other plants and this helps to fertilize the soil.
